mapper.insert: INSERT INTO egen_teto_test_result ( userNo, userName, gender, testResultType, styleSelfcareResultType, socialSkillResultType, innerTendencyResultType, ambitionResultType, zScore, topPercent, tetoScore, egenScore, styleSelfcarePoint, socialSkillPoint, innerTendencyPoint, ambitionPoint, isTesterMyself ) VALUES ( #{result.userNo}, #{result.userName}, #{result.gender}, #{result.testResultType}, #{result.styleSelfcareResultType}, #{result.socialSkillResultType}, #{result.innerTendencyResultType}, #{result.ambitionResultType}, #{result.zScore}, #{result.topPercent}, #{result.tetoScore}, #{result.egenScore}, #{result.styleSelfcarePoint}, #{result.socialSkillPoint}, #{result.innerTendencyPoint}, #{result.ambitionPoint}, #{result.isTesterMyself} )
mapper.select: SELECT userNo, userName, gender, testResultType, styleSelfcareResultType, socialSkillResultType, innerTendencyResultType, ambitionResultType, zScore, topPercent, tetoScore, egenScore, styleSelfcarePoint, socialSkillPoint, innerTendencyPoint, ambitionPoint, isTesterMyself, testDate FROM egen_teto_test_result WHERE userNo = #{userNo}
SELECT IFNULL(AVG(tetoScore), 50.0) as avgScore, IFNULL(STDDEV(tetoScore), 15.0) as stdDevScore, COUNT(*) as totalCount FROM egen_teto_test_result
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as maleCount, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN gender = 'W' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as femaleCount FROM egen_teto_test_result
